courses.summary: Master the essential cleaning techniques that elevate kitchen safety, boost operational efficiency, and enhances your career prospects in the hospitality industry.

modules.name: Overview and SAQA Structure
modules.description: Welcome to Kitchenette Cleaner Course This course has three phases as part of GoalVow Ecosystem for learners: To Learn through Theory Knowledge Modules To Develop through Practical Skills Training Modules To Inspire through Workplace Experience Modules Course Entry Requirements The minimum entry requirement for this course is: Open Access, meaning anyone can enrol in this course. Course Purpose The purpose of this course is to prepare the learner to function as a Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner in the workplace. A Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner, cleans and maintains a commercial kitchenette which is a workplace kitchen. In addition, learner attributes(including communication) will be integrated in the learning process. Learners will have to prove competence of the above knowledge, skills, attitudes, responsibilities, and tasks imbedded in the exit level outcomes of this course. Course Learning Outcome After completing this course, a learner will be able to: Prepare equipment and tools,

sections.title: Theory Knowledge Module 1: Introduction to the world of work
sections.summary: info Knowledge Module 1 (KM-01): The main focus of knowledge module 1 is to: Build an understanding of the world of work. Enable the learner to demonstrate an understanding of various work related requirements like: KM-01-KT01: Employment Contract (20%) KM-01-KT02: Organizational work (20%) KM-01-KT03: Employer-Employee relationships (15%) KM-01-KT04: Concepts related to the performance of work (15%) KM-01-KT05: Ethics at work (10%) KM-01-KT06: Current trends influencing work (10%) KM-01-KT07: Basic Communication Skills (10%) Time duration to complete this module, is at least 7 days.

sections.title: Workplace Experience Module 1: Procedures for completing before shift duties

modules.name: Work Experience Module 1
modules.description: Work Experience Module 1 (WM-01): The main focus of Work Experience Module 1 is to: Provide the learner an opportunity to gain real work exposure to complete before shift duties. The learner will be required to successfully complete each work experience under supervision and independently at least five times within a period of five weeks. Learners will be required to: WM-01-WE01 Wear PPE WM-01-WE02 Check tools and equipment for functionality WM-01-WE03 Collect consumables and chemicals Time duration to complete this module, is at least 5 days.

courses.summary: Gain skills for maintaining pristine, hygienic washrooms, ensuring a safer, healthier environment while advancing your career in high-demand facilities management.

modules.name: Overview and SAQA Structure
modules.description: Welcome to Ablution Cleaner Course This course has three phases as part of GoalVow Ecosystem for learners: To Learn through Theory Knowledge Modules To Develop through Practical Skills Training Modules To Inspire through Workplace Experience Modules Course Overview This course is SAQA structured with NQF level 1, Credits 46 in total as shown below: Knowledge Modules (KM): 811201-000-00-00-KM-01, Introduction to the World of Work, NQF level 1, Credits 6 811201-000-00-00-KM-04, Commercial Cleaning Equipment, Chemicals and Consumables, NQF level 1, Credits 5 811201-000-00-00-KM-06, Cleaning Ablution Facilities, NQF level 1, Credits 5 Total number of credits for Knowledge Modules: 16 Credits Practical Skill Modules (PM): 811201-000-00-00-PM-01, Complete before shift duties, NQF Level 1, Credits 3 811201-000-00-00-PM-04, Clean ablution facilities, NQF Level 1, Credits 5 811201-000-00-00-PM-07, Check and confirm completed tasks, NQF Level 1, Credits 5 Total number of credits for Practical Sk

modules.name: Purpose and Outcome
modules.description: Purpose The purpose of this course is to prepare the learner to function as a Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner in the workplace. A Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner, cleans and maintains a commercial kitchenette which is a workplace kitchen. In addition, learner attributes(including communication) will be integrated in the learning process. Learners will have to prove competence of the above knowledge, skills, attitudes, responsibilities, and tasks imbedded in the exit level outcomes of this course. Learning Outcome After completing this course, a learner will be able to: Prepare equipment and tools, chemical and consumables to clean the kitchenette to specifications. Complete cleaning of the kitchenette to expected standard using cleaning principles and methods.

courses.fullname: Commercial Above  the Floor Surface Cleaner
courses.summary: Master the techniques for spotless windows, walls, and high surfaces, enhancing safety, aesthetics, and increase your opportunities in commercial cleaning.

modules.name: Overview and SAQA Structure
modules.description: Welcome to Above the Floor Surface Cleaner Course This course has three phases as part of GoalVow Ecosystem for learners: To Learn through Theory Knowledge Modules To Develop through Practical Skills Training Modules To Inspire through Workplace Experience Modules Course Overview This course is SAQA structured with NQF level 1, Credits 46 in total as shown below: Knowledge Modules (KM): 811201-000-00-00-KM-01, Introduction to the World of Work, NQF level 1, Cr 6 811201-000-00-00-KM-04, Commercial Cleaning Equipment, Chemicals and Consumables, NQF level 1, Cr 5 811201-000-00-00-KM-08, Introduction to above the floor surface, NQF level 1, Cr 4 Total number of credits for Knowledge Modules: 15 Practical Skill Modules (PM): 811201-000-00-00-PM-01, Complete before shift duties, NQF Level 1, Cr 3 811201-000-00-00-PM-02, Clean above floor surfaces, NQF Level 1, Cr 6 811201-000-00-00-PM-07, Check and confirm completed tasks, NQF Level 1, Cr 5 Total number of credits for Practical Skill Modules

courses.summary: Develop specialized skills in floor care and maintenance, ensuring safer, polished surfaces that elevate any commercial space and boost your career in facility management.

modules.name: Overview and SAQA Structure
modules.description: Welcome to Commercial Floor Surface Cleaner Course This course has three phases as part of GoalVow Ecosystem for learners: To Learn through Theory Knowledge Modules To Develop through Practical Skills Training Modules To Inspire through Workplace Experience Modules Course Overview This course is SAQA structured with NQF level 1, Credits 49 in total as shown below: Knowledge Modules (KM): 811201-000-00-00-KM-01, Introduction to the World of Work, NQF level 1, Cr 6 811201-000-00-00-KM-04, Commercial Cleaning Equipment, Chemicals and Consumables, NQF level 1, Cr 5 811201-000-00-00-KM-07, Basics of Cleaning Commercial floor surface, NQF level 1, Cr 4 Total number of credits for Knowledge Modules: 15 Credits Practical Skill Modules (PM): 811201-000-00-00-PM-01, Complete before shift duties, NQF Level 1, Cr 3 811201-000-00-00-PM-06, Clean floor surfaces, NQF Level 1, Cr 6 811201-000-00-00-PM-07, Check and confirm completed tasks, NQF Level 1, Cr 5 Total number of credits for Practical Skill

modules.name: Purpose and Outcome
modules.description: Purpose The purpose of this course is to prepare the learner to function as a Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner in the workplace. A Commercial Kitchenette Cleaner, cleans and maintains a commercial kitchenette which is a workplace kitchen. In addition, learner attributes(including communication) will be integrated in the learning process. Learners will have to prove competence of the above knowledge, skills, attitudes, responsibilities, and tasks imbedded in the exit level outcomes of this course. Learning Outcome After completing this course, a learner will be able to: Prepare equipment and tools, chemical and consumables to clean the kitchenette to specifications. Complete cleaning of the kitchenette to expected standard using cleaning principles and methods.
